skills.name: Sequential Basic
skills.description: Process that starts only after preceding processes in the stage have completed. Used to enforce order within a multi-process stage.

skills.name: With Call Params

skills.name: With Process SLA
skills.description: Process configured with a process-level SLA. pySLAType='Always' attaches the SLA rule named in pyStepSLA.

skills.name: With Rule Parameters
skills.description: Process declaring its parameter interface via pzRuleParameters (name, type, description, required flag). pyCallParams supplies the values; pzRuleParameters describes the contract.

skills.name: Alternate Rejected
skills.description: Second alternate stage (ALT2) for rejection path. Terminal with Resolved-Rejected status; does not cascade child resolution.

skills.name: Alternate Withdrawn
skills.description: Alternate stage for withdrawal/cancellation. Uses ALT1 ID, resolution transition, and cascades cancellation to child cases.

skills.name: Automatic Transition
skills.description: Mid-lifecycle stage that auto-advances when all processes complete. Sets pyStageEntryStatus to mark the case as in-progress.

skills.name: Conditional Skip Expression
skills.description: Stage gated by an inline expression rather than a when-rule. Uses pySkipOrAllowType='expression' with pyExpressionToSkipOrAllow.

skills.name: Conditional Skip When For Stage
skills.description: Stage that is conditionally skipped based on a when-rule. Uses pySkipOrAllowType='when' with pySkipStageWhen referencing the rule.

skills.name: Initialization Stage
skills.description: First primary stage entered during case creation. Marked with pyIsInitializationStage and contains the create form process.

skills.name: Manual Transition
skills.description: Stage that waits for an explicit user/system action to advance. Used for approval gates or external dependencies.

skills.name: Multi Process Pipeline
skills.description: Single stage running two processes — one PARALLEL (starts immediately) and one SEQUENTIAL (waits for the parallel process to finish).

skills.name: Terminal Resolution
skills.description: Final primary stage that resolves the case. Sets pyStageTransition='resolution', pyIsTerminalStage='true', a resolved status, and runs the cleanup process.

skills.name: With Local Actions
skills.description: Stage exposing one or more stage-scoped local actions (visible only while the case is in this stage). Supplements case-wide local actions.

skills.name: With Required Attachments
skills.description: Stage that blocks advancement until specific attachment categories have at least one attachment. Combines pyAttachments with pyRequiredCategories.

skills.name: With Stage SLA
skills.description: Stage configured with a stage-level SLA via pySLAType='Always'. The actual goal/deadline intervals live in the referenced SLA rule.

skills.name: With Validation
skills.description: Stage that runs a validate rule on entry via pyValidate. If validation fails, the transition into the stage is blocked.

skills.name: Simple Linear
skills.description: Case type with three primary stages (Create, Fulfillment, Completed) and one alternate stage (Withdrawn).

skills.description: Minimal case type definition — smallest valid create payload with a single stage.

Without this, references like "Appointment.pyID" fail with "page not declared" warnings.

skills.name: List Field — Sorted column
skills.description: A single pyListFields entry — sorted column. pySortOrder is the sort-priority rank (1 = primary, 2 = secondary, etc.) and MUST be paired with pySortType. For unsorted columns, omit both pySortOrder and pySortType entirely.

skills.name: List Field — Unsorted column
skills.description: A single pyListFields entry — unsorted column. Omit pySortOrder and pySortType entirely for unsorted columns.

skills.name: Max Records and Timeout Configuration
skills.description: pyMaxRecords limits result rows and must be mirrored in BOTH pyContent and pyUI. pyQueryTimeoutValue, pyMaxRecordsForExport, and pyQueryTimeoutValueForExport are independent optional fields — only set them when explicitly requested. Paging must be disabled in both layers for pyMaxRecords to take effect.

skills.name: Named Page Declaration
skills.description: A single pyPagesAndClasses entry — declares a named page for filter binding.

skills.name: Pagination Configuration
skills.description: Paging must be mirrored in BOTH pyContent.pyPaging AND pyUI.pyUserInteractions.pyPagingParams. Omitting the pyUI mirror causes the auto-fill to default paging, which can silently override pyMaxRecords. When paging is enabled (pyPagingEnabled=true), pyMaxRecords is ignored. To limit results to a fixed number of rows, set pyPagingEnabled to false in both layers and use pyMaxRecords instead.

skills.description: Validates Rule-CorrType (Correspondence Type) payloads for Pega Infinity. Correspondence types define the delivery channel for outbound correspondence -- email, fax, postal mail, phone/text, etc.

skills.name: rules-rule-decision-dataset/schema/rule-decision-dataset
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega dataset rule (Rule-Decision-DataSet) via create-rule / update-rule. Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-declare-decision-table/schema/rule-declare-decision-table
skills.description: JSON schema for creating a Pega Decision Table (Rule-Declare-DecisionTable). Fields marked x-pega-autoFill are injected by the builder and may be omitted from payloads. Uses simple string arrays for pyCondition and pyResults. Supports multi-result tables via pyPropertyColumns for setting multiple output properties per row.

skills.name: rules-rule-declare-pages/schema/rule-declare-pages
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega data page rule (Rule-Declare-Pages) via create-rule / update-rule. Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-edit-validate/schema/rule-edit-validate
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega edit validate rule (Rule-Edit-Validate). Edit validate rules contain Java code that validates a single property value, returning true if valid or false (with an error message) if invalid.

skills.name: rules-rule-notification/schema/rule-notification
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega notification rule (Rule-Notification). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-activity/schema/rule-obj-activity
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega activity rule (Rule-Obj-Activity). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-attachmentcategory/schema/rule-obj-attachmentcategory
skills.description: JSON schema for Pega attachment category rules (Rule-Obj-AttachmentCategory). An attachment category is a named grouping that controls which attachment types (files, URLs, notes, correspondence, screenshots, scanned documents) are permitted on cases of a given class.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-casetype/schema/rule-obj-casetype
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega case type definition (Rule-Obj-CaseType). A case type defines the lifecycle of a business case: its stages, processes within stages, local actions, child case relationships, attachments, and runtime behavior. System-managed fields (pxInsKey, pxCreateDateTime, etc.) are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-class/schema/rule-obj-class
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega class definition (Rule-Obj-Class). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-corr/schema/rule-obj-corr
skills.description: Validates Rule-Obj-Corr (Correspondence) payloads for Pega Infinity. Correspondence rules define outbound communication content -- email bodies, letter templates, and document merge content -- associated with a correspondence type (Rule-CorrType).

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-fieldvalue/schema/rule-obj-fieldvalue
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega field value rule (Rule-Obj-FieldValue). Field values store localizable text strings — labels, messages, captions, prompts, button text, notification messages, and error classifications — associated with a property on a class. Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-flow/schema/rule-obj-flow
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega flow rule (Rule-Obj-Flow). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-flowaction/schema/rule-obj-flowaction
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega flow action rule (Rule-Obj-FlowAction). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-model/schema/rule-obj-model
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Data Transform rule (Rule-Obj-Model). Fields marked x-pega-autoFill are injected by the builder and may be omitted from payloads.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-property/schema/rule-obj-property
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega property rule (Rule-Obj-Property). Covers scalar (String, Date, Integer, etc.), page, page list, page group, string list, string group, gateway/linked, and dropdown prompt list patterns.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-report-definition/schema/rule-obj-report-definition
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Report Definition rule (Rule-Obj-Report-Definition). Covers list and summary reports with columns, filters, parameters, pagination, sub-reports, and source configuration.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-servicelevel/schema/rule-obj-servicelevel
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Service Level Agreement rule (Rule-Obj-ServiceLevel). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-validate/schema/rule-obj-validate
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega validate rule (Rule-Obj-Validate). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted. Validate rules enforce property-level validation logic using a declarative grid (pyValidationValues) that compiles to activity steps (pySteps).

skills.name: rules-rule-obj-when/schema/rule-obj-when
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega When rule (Rule-Obj-When). When rules evaluate boolean conditions using one or more condition clauses combined with AND/OR logic. Used by flows (decision shapes), validate rules, activities, and UI visibility conditions.

skills.name: rules-rule-ruleset-branch/schema/rule-ruleset-branch
skills.description: JSON schema for a Pega rule branch. This is an infrastructure rule type.

skills.name: rules-rule-service-mcp/schema/rule-service-mcp
skills.description: Validates Rule-Service-MCP payloads for Pega Infinity. An MCP Service rule defines a Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint that exposes application capabilities as tools to external AI agents and LLMs. This schema validates the rule's core metadata, service identity, MCP versioning, usage and description text, and the set of published tools (including case-type-derived and custom tools).

skills.name: rules-rule-test-application-businessaction/schema/rule-test-application-businessaction
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Business Action (Rule-Test-Application-BusinessAction) via create-rule / update-rule. Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

skills.name: rules-rule-test-application-case/schema/rule-test-application-case
skills.description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Application Test Case (Rule-Test-Application-Case). Composes Business Actions into end-to-end test sequences.

skills.name: rules-rule-test-unit-case/schema/rule-test-unit-case

skills.name: rules-rule-ui-theme/schema/rule-ui-theme
skills.description: JSON schema for the Rule-UI-Theme class definition (Rule-Obj-Class). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed runtime and provenance fields are intentionally omitted.
